name: Language Of The Heart Group
notes:
Weeks one, two, three, and five are Step meetings in numerical order Step one, step two, three, etc.. With week number four being on the tradition correlating to the current month we’re in. We reference the 12 x 12 often and usually read parts of the chapter relating to that weeks step or tradition. Then go around and share our experience, strength and hope regarding that night’s reading.
